judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly attributes the R$600 benefit to the Auxílio Emergencial (Coronavoucher) from 2020, rather than the Auxílio Brasil established by PEC 1/2022 in 2022, which is the core factual claim being evaluated.
The response correctly attributes the R$600 benefit to Bolsonaro but inaccurately identifies it as the Auxílio Emergencial instead of the Auxílio Brasil established under PEC 1/2022.
